title: ReplayMod AutoMarker
description: Automatically places markers on ReplayMod recordings when in-game events happen
body:
# ReplayMod AutoMarker

Ever lost a great moment because you forgot to note the timestamp? AutoMarker handles that automatically.

The mod watches for deaths, advancements, and chat keywords while you play, and drops a named marker on your ReplayMod timeline each time one fires. Open the replay later and every highlight is already waiting for you.

---

## What gets marked

- **Deaths** — `Player Died` marker every time you die. Useful for speedrun resets, highlight reels, or just figuring out what killed you.
- **Advancements** — `Advancement: [Name]` when you complete one. No more guessing where the good stuff happened.
- **Chat keywords** — you pick the words; the mod watches for them and drops a `Chat: [Keyword]` marker when one shows up. Works well for stream alerts, manual bookmarks via chat, or specific server messages you care about.

---

## Configuration

Press **K** in-game to open the config screen, or go through Mod Menu → AutoMarker → Configure.

You can toggle each marker type on or off and set your chat keywords as a comma-separated list (e.g. `marker, highlight, raid`).

Settings are saved to `.minecraft/config/replaymod_auto_markers.json` if you prefer to edit them directly.
